name: Breaking Par Indoor Golf
about: Breaking Par Indoor Golf is a golf simulator venue located in [City, State] that offers a premium indoor golfing experience. The venue features multiple simulator bays equipped with advanced technology for golfers of all skill levels to practice or play virtual rounds. While specific details about their technology and amenities are not available from the current content, the venue provides a dedicated space for golf simulation and practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor facility allows for year-round golfing regardless of weather conditions
Advanced simulator technology provides realistic ball and club tracking
Multiple simulator bays offer flexibility for solo practice or group play
Suitable for both casual players and serious golf looking to improve their game

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with various beverage options

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with radar-based tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent equipment from the venue. Club rentals are available for those without their own gear.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers on-site food and beverage options, but outside food and drinks may be permitted. It's best to check with the venue directly for their policy on outside items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the simulator software and number of players in the bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Breaking Par Indoor Golf is family-friendly and welcomes junior golfers. They have programs and equipment suitable for younger players.
